name: Pre-cleanup: delete stale resources
instruction: List all GoodMem spaces. If you find one named "E2E Test Space", delete it. Then list all LLMs and delete any named "E2E Test LLM". Then list all embedders and delete any named "E2E Test Embedder". Say what you cleaned up or "nothing to clean up".

name: Lookup known embedder model
instruction: Look up the model text-embedding-3-large in the GoodMem model registry

name: Lookup known LLM model
instruction: Look up the model gpt-4o in the GoodMem model registry

name: Get current user
instruction: Get my current GoodMem user information

name: RAG 1: Create embedder
instruction: Create a GoodMem embedder called "E2E Test Embedder" using the model text-embedding-3-large with OpenAI API key $OPENAI_API_KEY

name: RAG 2: Create LLM
instruction: Create a GoodMem LLM called "E2E Test LLM" using model gpt-4o with OpenAI API key $OPENAI_API_KEY

name: RAG 3: Create space
instruction: Create a GoodMem space called "E2E Test Space" using the embedder named "E2E Test Embedder"

name: RAG 4: Ingest text memory
instruction: Create a text memory in the GoodMem space named "E2E Test Space" with this content: "Transformers are a type of neural network architecture that are particularly well-suited for natural language processing tasks. A Transformer model leverages the attention mechanism to capture long-range dependencies in the input sequence."

name: RAG 5: Check memory processing status
instruction: List the memories in the GoodMem space named "E2E Test Space" and tell me the processing status of each memory.

name: RAG 6: Retrieve with query
instruction: Search the GoodMem space named "E2E Test Space" with the query "What are Transformers?" and return up to 5 results

name: RAG 7: List memories in space
instruction: List all memories in the GoodMem space named "E2E Test Space"

name: Cleanup: delete space (cascades to memories)
instruction: Find the GoodMem space named "E2E Test Space" and delete it

name: Cleanup: delete LLM
instruction: Find the GoodMem LLM named "E2E Test LLM" and delete it

name: Cleanup: delete embedder
instruction: Find the GoodMem embedder named "E2E Test Embedder" and delete it
